title: audiod Transcript Event
description: Emitted by audiod on every transcribed speech segment. Streamed via stdout (newline-delimited JSON), WebSocket /stream (RFC 6455 text frames), and Unix socket (newline-delimited JSON).

type.description: Discriminator. Only `transcript` is currently emitted by audiod; reserved for future variants (e.g. `vad_start`, `vad_end`).

session_id.description: Stable across the audiod process lifetime. Use to group events from one capture session.

event_id.description: Unique per event. Idempotency key for downstream consumers.

seq.description: Monotonic per-session counter. Strictly increasing, no gaps unless explicit in a future schema version.

text.description: Transcribed text. Empty string is allowed (whisper produced no text for the segment).

start_ms.description: Segment start in milliseconds, relative to capture start of the current session.

end_ms.description: Segment end in milliseconds, relative to capture start of the current session. end_ms >= start_ms.

confidence.description: Whisper's average token-level probability. May be 0.0 for empty segments.

ts_ms.description: Wall-clock emission time (Unix epoch milliseconds, UTC). Set by audiod at the moment of WS/stdout/socket write.

language.description: Optional. ISO-639-1 code (e.g. 'en'). Present when whisper was configured with language='auto' and detected a non-empty language.

model.description: Optional. Absolute path to the whisper model that produced this transcript. Useful for audit when model is hot-swapped via /reload.
